classification.reasoning: The patch introduces new operator classes (AllLikeOperator, AllNotLikeOperator) and extends existing classes (AllOperator, LikeOperators, ExpressionAnalyzer, Function) to support new 'ALL LIKE' and 'ALL NOT LIKE' operators. It involves adding new files, modifying method signatures, and updating operator registration and printing logic. The changes are structural, involving new class hierarchies and integration into existing expression analysis and symbol printing frameworks. The patch is not a trivial string replacement or whitespace change, nor a deep refactoring or complete redesign, but a moderate structural extension, fitting TYPE_III classification. The localization evidence shows all hunks found exactly, indicating straightforward application but the complexity of new code and integration justifies a high confidence but not absolute certainty. The token budget estimate reflects the size and complexity of the patch including new classes and tests.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import for AllOperator among existing operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of the AllOperator class in expression analysis.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Removed import of AllOperator from the imports list.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To clean up unused import, possibly because AllOperator is now imported elsewhere or no longer needed here.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified call to LikeOperators.arrayOperatorName to include an additional parameter 'quantifier' instead of just inverse and ignoreCase flags.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: ExpressionAnalyzer.visitArrayLikePredicate (or equivalent method handling array LIKE predicates)
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support array LIKE operators that distinguish between quantifiers (e.g., ANY, ALL) for more precise operator resolution.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added imports for AllLikeOperator, AllNotLikeOperator, and AllOperator alongside existing any-operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage and registration of ALL variants of LIKE operators in the LikeOperators class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of ArrayComparison to LikeOperators.java.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To use ArrayComparison.Quantifier enum for distinguishing ANY and ALL quantifiers in array LIKE operators.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Introduced new operator name constants for ALL variants of LIKE and ILIKE (ALL_LIKE, ALL_ILIKE, ALL_NOT_LIKE, ALL_NOT_ILIKE).
hunk_descriptions.intent: To define operator name constants for the new ALL quantifier LIKE operators to be used in function registration and resolution.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified arrayOperatorName method to accept an ArrayComparison.Quantifier parameter and return operator names based on quantifier (ANY or ALL), negate flag, and ignoreCase flag.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support generating correct operator names for array LIKE operations depending on quantifier (ANY or ALL), enabling semantic distinction in operator resolution.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Registered new scalar functions for ALL_LIKE, ALL_NOT_LIKE, ALL_ILIKE, and ALL_NOT_ILIKE with appropriate signatures and case sensitivity in the function builder.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To add support for ALL quantifier LIKE operators as first-class scalar functions with proper signatures and case sensitivity handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new class AllLikeOperator implementing the ALL quantifier LIKE operator with case sensitivity support and validation against object arrays.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide an operator implementation that matches a string against all elements of an array using LIKE semantics, supporting both case sensitive and insensitive modes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new class AllNotLikeOperator implementing the ALL quantifier NOT LIKE operator with case sensitivity support and validation.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide an operator implementation that matches a string against all elements of an array using NOT LIKE semantics, supporting both case sensitive and insensitive modes.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of LikeOperators to AllOperator.java.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of LikeOperators utilities within the AllOperator base class or its subclasses.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended the sealed AllOperator class to permit new subclasses AllLikeOperator and AllNotLikeOperator.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To formally include the new ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operator implementations in the AllOperator hierarchy for type safety and pattern matching.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operator names to the list of recognized AllOperator names.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To register the new ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operators as valid AllOperator names for function resolution and dispatch.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed iteration logic over rightValues to only increment matches count if rightValue is null or matches the leftValue, skipping validation and matching if rightValue is null.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To correctly handle null elements in the array by counting them as matches without further validation or matching logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified toQuery method to use getFirst() instead of get(0) when unwrapping ArrayUnnestFunction argument and removed unchecked cast on literalMatchesAllArrayRef call.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve safety and correctness when extracting the underlying argument from an ArrayUnnestFunction and simplify type handling in query translation.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of AllOperator alongside existing operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling and printing of AllOperator functions in the Function class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended function printing logic to detect and print AllOperator functions similarly to AnyOperator functions.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: Function.toString or equivalent method handling function printing
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support correct string representation of ALL quantifier operators in expressions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Fixed substring offset when extracting operator name for AnyOperator functions to use the length of the operator prefix constant instead of a hardcoded number.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To make operator name extraction robust and maintainable by using the defined prefix length constant.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new private method printAllOperator to format ALL quantifier operator functions with proper syntax and operator name extraction.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a dedicated method for printing ALL quantifier operators in a human-readable and consistent manner.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new AllLikeOperator class implementing LIKE semantics for ALL quantifier arrays, including case sensitivity handling and validation against object arrays.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added new AllNotLikeOperator class implementing NOT LIKE semantics for ALL quantifier arrays with case sensitivity and validation logic.

hunk_descriptions.intent: To register the new ALL LIKE and ALL NOT LIKE operators for recognition and dispatch.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Fixed logic in iteration over right array values to not increment matches count when rightValue is null, but still mark anyNulls true; added else branch for validation and matching.

hunk_descriptions.intent: To correctly handle null elements in the array when evaluating ALL operator matches, ensuring accurate match counting.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified toQuery method to use getFirst() instead of get(0) when unwrapping ArrayUnnestFunction argument; removed unchecked cast annotation and simplified casting in literalMatchesAllArrayRef and refMatchesAllArrayLiteral calls.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve safety and clarity when extracting underlying symbols from unnest functions and avoid unchecked casts.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of AllOperator alongside existing operator imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable handling of AllOperator instances in Function class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Extended function printing logic to detect and print AllOperator functions similarly to AnyOperator functions.

hunk_descriptions.intent: To support proper string representation of ALL operator functions in expressions.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Corrected substring offset when extracting operator name for printing AnyOperator functions to use the length of the AnyOperator prefix constant instead of a hardcoded value.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To make operator name extraction robust and consistent with prefix definition.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added printAllOperator method to format ALL operator functions with proper parentheses and ALL keyword wrapping the second argument.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: Function class, new private method printAllOperator
hunk_descriptions.intent: To provide a consistent and clear string representation for ALL operator functions in expressions.
